name: @sherif-fanous/pi-catppuccin
description: Catppuccin themes for the Pi Coding Agent
readme:
# @sherif-fanous/pi-catppuccin

Catppuccin themes for the Pi Coding Agent. This package provides all four official Catppuccin flavors as installable Pi themes.

## Available Themes

- 🌻 `catppuccin-latte` (light)
- 🪴 `catppuccin-frappe` (dark)
- 🌺 `catppuccin-macchiato` (dark)
- 🌿 `catppuccin-mocha` (dark)

## Install

```shell
pi install npm:@sherif-fanous/pi-catppuccin
```

Or try without installing

```shell
pi -e npm:@sherif-fanous/pi-catppuccin
```

Then select a theme via `/settings`.

## Uninstall

```shell
pi remove npm:@sherif-fanous/pi-catppuccin
```
